title: [RESOURCE PACK] Magic Items
description: the resource pack for magic items! https://modrinth.com/datapack/magic-items
body:
## Welcome to [Magic Items]
The Resource Pack for [Magic Items](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magic-items)

Click to join the [**COMMUNITY SERVER**](https://discord.gg/BHUG77PnJu)

### Instruction (If You want to download for just the world)
- Click on DOWNLOAD
- GO TO MINECRAFT
- OPTIONS
- RESOURCE PACK
- OPEN PACK FOLDER and put the resource pack inside

### **How to Install [Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magic-items)**
#
### Look at [GALLERY](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magic-items/gallery) if you want to see the pictures one by one!
